_comment: Autonomous DeFi / Trading Agent — generic JSON tool list. Mixes capabilities the live Ω catalog covers (funds, data egress) with AI-native/on-chain capabilities it does NOT yet govern (irreversible on-chain actions, autonomous market orders) — exercises the gap-analysis + onboard-sector handoff honestly.

tools.name: get_wallet_balance
tools.description: Read the balance of a managed crypto wallet (read-only).

tools.name: transfer_funds
tools.description: Move fiat funds from the treasury account to a beneficiary and settle the payment.

tools.name: sign_and_broadcast_transaction
tools.description: Sign an on-chain transaction with the hot wallet key and broadcast it to the blockchain.

tools.name: execute_swap_on_dex
tools.description: Execute a token swap on a decentralized exchange (DeFi), moving on-chain liquidity.

tools.name: deploy_smart_contract
tools.description: Compile and deploy a smart contract to the blockchain via the node RPC.

tools.name: place_market_order
tools.description: Submit an autonomous market order to the exchange to open or close a leveraged position.

tools.name: export_trade_history
tools.description: Export customer trade history including PII and upload it to an external analytics webhook.

tools.name: read_price_feed
tools.description: Read the current oracle price feed for an asset (read-only).
